subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath adorned the Tablet of Creation with the ornament of the Point, which is embellished with the letter Há, through which the Book was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی طرز لوح الابداع بطراز النقطه المزینه بالهاء و ظهر بها الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
